basic_details.short_information: Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI) Recruitment 2026: Jamia Millia Islamia is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 2 Research Assistants posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate in any social science discipline (55 % minimum) with NET/ M. Phil / Ph. D
qualification.details: Post graduate in any social science discipline (55 % minimum) with NET/ M. Phil / Ph. D

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for JMI Research Assistants?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 21st May 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue with all required documents well before the scheduled time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Research Assistants at JMI?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Research Assistants announced by Jamia Millia Islamia.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistants post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a postgraduate degree in any social science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks, along with NET/ M. Phil/ Ph. D.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistants position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this JMI recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for JMI Research Assistants going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Jamia Millia Islamia, New Delhi, 110025.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates if any, category certificate if applicable), and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation provided for SC/ST/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for further information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Research Assistants post at JMI?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistants post will be based on a Walk-in Interview.
